full_text:
Xin Xianying 辛憲英
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xin Xianying (辛憲英)was born in Yingchuan. Advised her brother Chang to go to Cao Shuang’s camp, saving his life. Advised Xin Pi and others. Xin Xianying was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xin Xianying lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
